title: A small daily AI workflow improvement
summaryLines: A small improvement to the morning workflow can remove a lot of posting friction.
The first step is to wire RSS and OpenAI together in a controlled way.
Tomo-channel should stay short, readable, and easy to scan.
bodyLines: This sample exists only for the autopost verification flow.
In production, do not trust the RSS candidate list or the OpenAI output without review.
whyItMatters: A stable article entry point makes daily operations much easier.
tomoPoint: Get one article through first, then refine the RSS and prompt.

bodyLines: This is a sample autopost article.
Use it to verify RSS and OpenAI connectivity.
